description_long: This object is a heavily corroded and incomplete revolver-style handgun, likely made of metal, with significant portions of the frame and grip missing or eroded. The cylinder is blocky and prominent, with the trigger and trigger guard still partially intact, though the guard is thin and irregular. The barrel is elongated and straight, but its surface is rough and pitted, showing signs of rust and age. The grip area is skeletal, lacking any covering or ergonomic shaping, and appears jagged and uneven. There are no visible markings, engravings, or embellishments on the surface, and the overall finish is matte and rough. The object has a dark, almost black coloration, with a texture that suggests extensive weathering or exposure to harsh conditions.
description: A corroded, incomplete revolver-style handgun with a rough, dark metal surface and missing grip panels. The frame, barrel, and cylinder are heavily pitted and irregular.
description_view_0: Side view showing the revolver's blocky cylinder, elongated barrel, and skeletal, incomplete grip.
description_view_1: Narrow end-on view highlighting the thin profile of the barrel and the width of the cylinder.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the same corroded features, with the trigger and jagged grip more visible.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the barrel's opening and the circular face of the cylinder.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is skeletal and incomplete, lacking any covering or ergonomic shaping. Its contour is irregular and jagged, with no visible surface pattern, texturing, or embellishments. The material appears to be the same corroded metal as the rest of the object, and there are no finger grooves, logos, or unique design elements present.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is thin, irregular, and partially eroded, forming a rough oval shape around the trigger. It lacks reinforcement or texturing and does not feature any undercuts, squared-off edges, or integrated accessories. The overall appearance is utilitarian and heavily worn.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is straight, elongated, and of standard profile, with no visible threading, porting, or external features such as compensators. Its surface is rough and pitted, with no markings or special finishes apparent.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the exterior surfaces of the handgun, including the slide or frame. The surface is uniformly corroded and unadorned.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base or floorplate is not visible or distinguishable on this revolver-style handgun, as it does not utilize a detachable magazine. The grip terminates in a rough, open frame with no flat, extended, beveled, or flared features.
